compressed_prompt: Is the sentence "Mrs. Smith is the teacher of this class." grammatically correct? Give me exactly two different responses. Responses and only responses should be separated by 6 asterisk symbols: ******.
response:
Yes, the sentence is grammatically correct as it follows the standard subject-verb-object (SVO) word order and uses proper noun capitalization and title (Mrs.).
****** 
The sentence is grammatically correct; it properly uses the possessive form is implied with "of this class" to show the relationship between Mrs. Smith and the class.
